name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on bench, grip barbell shoulder-width, lower to chest, press up.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: Set bench to 30-45°, press dumbbells up from chest level.

name: Decline Bench Press
instructions: Lie on decline bench, lower barbell to lower chest, press up.

name: Dumbbell Fly
instructions: Lie flat, arms extended, lower dumbbells in arc to sides, squeeze back up.

name: Cable Crossover
instructions: Stand between cables, bring handles together in front of chest.

name: Push-Up
instructions: Hands shoulder-width, lower body to ground, push back up.

name: Dips (Chest)
instructions: Lean forward on dip bars, lower body, push back up.

name: Machine Chest Press
instructions: Sit in chest press machine, push handles forward, return slowly.

name: Pec Deck Fly
instructions: Sit in pec deck, bring pads together in front of chest.

name: Landmine Press
instructions: Hold end of barbell at shoulder, press up and forward.

name: Barbell Back Squat
instructions: Bar on upper back, squat down until thighs parallel, stand up.

name: Front Squat
instructions: Bar on front delts, squat down keeping torso upright.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Sit in leg press, push platform away, return with control.

name: Hack Squat
instructions: Stand on hack squat platform, squat down and press up.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Rear foot on bench, squat down on front leg, push up.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Sit in machine, extend legs straight, lower with control.

name: Leg Curl
instructions: Lie face down, curl weight toward glutes, lower slowly.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hinge at hips, lower barbell along legs, squeeze glutes to return.

name: Walking Lunges
instructions: Step forward into lunge, alternate legs while walking.

name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold dumbbell at chest, squat down, stand up.

name: Calf Raise
instructions: Stand on calf raise machine, raise heels, lower slowly.

name: Sumo Squat
instructions: Wide stance, toes out, squat holding dumbbell between legs.

name: Conventional Deadlift
instructions: Grip barbell, drive through heels, stand up, lower with control.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Hang from bar, pull chin above bar, lower with control.

name: Chin-Up
instructions: Underhand grip, pull chin above bar, lower slowly.

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Bend over, pull barbell to lower chest, lower slowly.

name: Dumbbell Row
instructions: One hand on bench, row dumbbell to hip, lower slowly.

name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Sit at cable row, pull handle to torso, return slowly.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Sit at pulldown machine, pull bar to upper chest, return.

name: T-Bar Row
instructions: Straddle T-bar, row weight to chest, lower slowly.

name: Face Pull
instructions: Pull rope to face level, squeeze shoulder blades, return.

name: Straight-Arm Pulldown
instructions: Arms straight, pull bar down to thighs, return slowly.

name: Hyperextension
instructions: On hyperextension bench, lower torso, raise back up squeezing glutes.

name: Overhead Press
instructions: Press barbell from shoulders overhead, lower with control.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Press dumbbells overhead from shoulder level, lower slowly.

name: Arnold Press
instructions: Start palms facing you, rotate and press overhead.

name: Lateral Raise
instructions: Raise dumbbells to sides until shoulder height, lower slowly.

name: Front Raise
instructions: Raise dumbbells in front to shoulder height, lower slowly.

name: Reverse Fly
instructions: Bend over, raise dumbbells to sides squeezing rear delts.

name: Upright Row
instructions: Pull barbell up along body to chin, lower slowly.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand beside cable, raise handle to side at shoulder height.

name: Machine Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit in shoulder press machine, press handles up, lower slowly.

name: Shrugs
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides, shrug shoulders up, lower slowly.

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Curl barbell from thighs to shoulders, lower slowly.

name: Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Curl dumbbells alternating or together, lower with control.

name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Neutral grip, curl dumbbells to shoulders, lower slowly.

name: Preacher Curl
instructions: Arms on preacher bench, curl bar up, lower slowly.

name: Concentration Curl
instructions: Sit, elbow on inner thigh, curl dumbbell, lower slowly.

name: Cable Curl
instructions: Curl cable bar from low position to shoulders.

name: Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Push cable bar down, extend arms fully, return slowly.

name: Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Hold dumbbell overhead, lower behind head, extend up.

name: Skull Crusher
instructions: Lie on bench, lower bar to forehead, extend arms.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
instructions: Narrow grip on bench press, lower to chest, press up.

name: Dips (Tricep)
instructions: Upright on dip bars, lower body, press back up.

name: Kickback
instructions: Bend over, extend arm back, squeeze tricep, return.

name: Wrist Curl
instructions: Forearms on thighs, curl wrists up, lower slowly.

name: Crunch
instructions: Lie on back, curl shoulders off ground, lower slowly.

name: Plank
instructions: Hold push-up position on forearms, keep body straight.

name: Russian Twist
instructions: Sit with feet up, rotate torso side to side.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Hang from bar, raise legs to 90°, lower slowly.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions: Kneel, roll wheel forward, pull back with core.

name: Cable Woodchop
instructions: Rotate torso pulling cable from high to low diagonally.

name: Mountain Climber
instructions: Plank position, drive knees to chest alternating rapidly.

name: Bicycle Crunch
instructions: Lie on back, pedal legs while twisting elbow to opposite knee.

name: Dead Bug
instructions: Lie on back, extend opposite arm and leg, alternate.

name: Side Plank
instructions: Lie on side, prop on forearm, hold body straight.

name: Pallof Press
instructions: Stand sideways to cable, press handle forward resisting rotation.

name: Hip Thrust
instructions: Upper back on bench, drive hips up with barbell on lap.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on back, drive hips up squeezing glutes, lower slowly.

name: Cable Kickback
instructions: Attach ankle strap, kick leg back squeezing glute.

name: Sumo Deadlift
instructions: Wide stance, grip between legs, stand up driving hips forward.

name: Step-Up
instructions: Step onto bench with one foot, drive up, step down.

name: Running (Treadmill)
instructions: Run on treadmill at steady pace or intervals.

name: Cycling (Stationary)
instructions: Pedal on stationary bike at chosen resistance.

name: Rowing Machine
instructions: Drive with legs, pull handle to chest, return.

name: Jump Rope
instructions: Jump over rope with both feet, maintain rhythm.

name: Elliptical
instructions: Stride on elliptical at chosen resistance.

name: Stair Climber
instructions: Step on stair climber at steady pace.

name: Battle Ropes
instructions: Alternate waving heavy ropes up and down rapidly.

name: Box Jump
instructions: Jump onto box, stand tall, step down.

name: Burpees
instructions: Squat, jump feet back, push-up, jump feet forward, jump up.

name: Jumping Jacks
instructions: Jump feet out while raising arms, return to start.

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Hinge at hips, swing kettlebell to shoulder height.

name: Sprints
instructions: Sprint maximum effort for short distances, rest, repeat.

name: Swimming
instructions: Swim laps using preferred stroke at steady pace.

name: Downward Dog
instructions: Hands and feet on floor, push hips up forming inverted V.

name: Pigeon Pose
instructions: Front shin on ground, back leg extended, fold forward.

name: Child's Pose
instructions: Kneel, sit back on heels, reach arms forward on ground.

name: Cat-Cow Stretch
instructions: On hands and knees, alternate arching and rounding back.

name: Seated Forward Fold
instructions: Sit with legs straight, reach forward toward toes.

name: Standing Quad Stretch
instructions: Stand, pull heel to glute, hold, switch legs.

name: Chest Doorway Stretch
instructions: Arm on doorframe at 90°, lean through to stretch chest.

name: Foam Roll (Full Body)
instructions: Roll each major muscle group on foam roller for 30-60s.

name: Hip Flexor Stretch
instructions: Kneel on one knee, push hips forward, hold.

name: World's Greatest Stretch
instructions: Lunge, twist torso toward front leg, reach up, hold.
